description_long: This is a traditional Japanese-style two-story house with a prominent tiled gable roof and wooden exterior accents. The front facade features sliding wooden windows, a central entryway with a wooden sign above the door, and a small covered porch area. The walls are a mix of white plaster and dark wood framing, with visible air conditioning units and bamboo blinds on some windows. The rear and side views reveal additional wooden paneling, more air conditioning units, and a small balcony with a bamboo screen. The roof is steeply pitched and covered in dark, textured tiles, with some greenery visible behind the upper story. The overall design is compact, with a harmonious blend of natural materials and traditional Japanese architectural elements.
description: A two-story traditional Japanese house with a tiled gable roof, wooden accents, sliding windows, and a central entryway with a wooden sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, wooden sign, sliding windows, and a small covered porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, white plaster walls, wooden framing, and greenery behind the upper story.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple air conditioning units, wooden paneling, and additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a bamboo-screened balcony, more air conditioning units, and wooden fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with sliding windows and bamboo blinds
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with a sign above, small covered porch, and traditional wooden framing
